channel.title: File-Management on My Linux Journey
channel.description: Recent content in File-Management on My Linux Journey

item.title: Split Large File for FAT32 USB - Linux Guide
item.author: youcef7770@gmail.com (Youcef)
item.description: Guide to splitting large files into smaller chunks for FAT32 USB transfer. Uses split command to create 4GB parts and cat to rejoin them.
